title: bornmuellera baldaccii subsp. baldaccii
intro: Bornmuellera baldaccii subsp. baldaccii, also known as the Italian mountain everlasting, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Italian Alps. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves containing compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bornmuellera baldaccii subsp. baldaccii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
